title: Y'all ever been to Crane Cove? : r/sanfrancisco - Reddit
content: Great park. Nice weather. Fun to paddle board. Good picnicking. Can't wait until the new Standard Deviant opens at Pier 70.

title: Crane Cove Park | SF Port
content: Crane Cove Park is a seven-acre bay front park in the Dogpatch neighborhood. The park has a beach with bay access for kayaking, paddle boarding and wading.
